evals.name: checkout-flow-benchmark
evals.prompt: Run a UX competitive benchmark on the checkout flow for Klook, GetYourGuide, and KKday. Our product is TripPal. Compare how each handles the cart-to-confirmation flow.
evals.expected_output: The skill should generate an HTML report with executive summary, methodology, per-competitor analysis, scoring matrix, and design recommendations.

assertions.name: Includes executive summary
assertions.check: HTML contains a summary or overview section

assertions.name: Scores competitors
assertions.check: Output includes numeric scores or ratings for competitors

assertions.name: Provides recommendations
assertions.check: HTML contains design recommendations for TripPal

evals.name: pdp-benchmark-bali-activities
evals.prompt: I need to understand how competitors present attraction products. Can you benchmark the product detail page experience for Bali activities across Klook, Viator, and Headout? Focus on trust signals and booking CTAs.
evals.expected_output: The skill should produce a comparative HTML report evaluating PDP trust signals, CTA clarity, and social proof across competitors.

assertions.name: Analyzes trust signals
assertions.check: Report mentions reviews, ratings, or social proof

assertions.name: Evaluates CTAs
assertions.check: Report discusses booking buttons or call-to-action elements

evals.name: mobile-ux-benchmark
evals.prompt: Compare the mobile booking experience on GetYourGuide vs KKday. We're specifically interested in how the date picker and ticket selection work on mobile viewports.
evals.expected_output: The skill should capture or analyze mobile viewport experiences, focusing on form design and mobile-friendly signals.

assertions.name: Addresses mobile UX
assertions.check: Report mentions mobile, viewport, or responsive design

assertions.name: Analyzes form inputs
assertions.check: Report discusses date picker or ticket selection
